name: Wallet Integration Test Agent
description: Run real wallet integration tests against staging environments on every PR. The agent IS the test user — it connects its own WaaP wallet, signs messages, sends testnet transactions, approves tokens, and calls contracts, then posts results as PR comments. Triggers deployment on merge. Runs on Base.
author: holonym-foundation

envVars.description: GitHub personal access token with repo and actions scopes
Comma-separated list of repos to monitor (e.g. owner/repo1,owner/repo2)
Base URL of the staging/preview environment to test against (e.g. https://staging.myapp.xyz)
Address of the contract to call during contract interaction tests
ERC-20 token address used for approval tests
Path to structured JSON log file
Webhook URL to trigger deployments on merge to main (e.g. Vercel deploy hook)
GitHub Actions workflow file name or ID to dispatch for CI runs
ETH amount to send in the transaction test (sent to self on testnet)
Hex-encoded calldata for the contract interaction test
